transactions.desc: The Yankees recalled Jones from Triple-A Scranton/Wilkes-Barre and appointed him as their 27th man for Wednesday's doubleheader versus the Pirates.
Carrasco signed a one-year, $360,000 contract with the LG Twins of the Korea Baseball Organization on Wednesday, Kim Tae-woo of SPOTV reports.
The Diamondbacks recalled Carrillo from Triple-A Reno on Tuesday.
The Tigers recalled Madden from Triple-A Toledo on Tuesday.
The Rangers selected Wynns' contract from Triple-A Round Rock on Tuesday, Jeff Wilson of AllDLLS.com reports.
The Rangers selected Gonzales' contract from Triple-A Round Rock on Tuesday, Jeff Wilson of AllDLLS.com reports.
The Phillies recalled De La Cruz from Triple-A Lehigh Valley on Tuesday, Lochlahn March of The Philadelphia Inquirer reports.
The Diamondbacks optioned Burgos to Triple-A Reno on Tuesday.
The Diamondbacks recalled Drake from Triple-A Reno on Tuesday.
The Dodgers optioned Knack to Triple-A Oklahoma City on Tuesday.
The Dodgers selected Barnes' contract from Triple-A Oklahoma City on Tuesday.
The Athletics recalled Muncy from Triple-A Las Vegas on Tuesday.
The Athletics recalled Juenger from Triple-A Las Vegas on Tuesday.
The Giants recalled Beck from Triple-A Sacramento on Tuesday, Evan Webeck of the California Post reports.
The Nationals recalled Yean from Triple-A Rochester on Tuesday.
The Nationals designated Lawrence for assignment Tuesday.
The Mets recalled Duarte from Triple-A Syracuse on Tuesday.
The Mets optioned Curry to Triple-A Syracuse on Tuesday.
Atlanta released Farmer on Tuesday.
Atlanta activated Yastrzemski (elbow) from the 10-day injured list Tuesday.
The Twins recalled Anderson from Triple-A St. Paul on Tuesday.
The White Sox recalled Quero from Triple-A Charlotte on Tuesday.
Double-A Frisco activated Walcott (elbow) from the 60-day injured list July 17.
The Red Sox optioned Gamboa to Triple-A Worcester on Saturday.
The Athletics outrighted Meneses to Triple-A Las Vegas on Monday.
Go was optioned to Triple-A St. Paul on Monday, Dan Hayes of The Athletic reports.
The Marlins recalled Brzykcy from Triple-A Jacksonville on Monday.
The Diamondbacks recalled Burgos from Triple-A Reno on Monday.
The Diamondbacks optioned Abner to Triple-A Reno on Monday.
The Padres recalled Duran from Triple-A El Paso on Monday.
